trades.sentiment_summary: Omnicom Group completed its $13.25 billion merger with IPG last week, including a $2.95 billion exchange offer for IPG notes and announcing a new leadership structure with five strategic divisions.[4] IPG shed 3,200 jobs and vacated over 700,000 sq ft of office space ahead of the merger to streamline operations, with 800 layoffs in Q3 2025.[5] No other IPG-specific news appears in the last 24 hours as of January 16, 2026.
